Part 1: Endless Invasions

Defeat 35 Slaver lvl 2, Slaver lvl 3

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Start at Hangar in Hyperion.
  2. Defeat 35 Slaver lvl 2, Slaver lvl 3.

Description

Lieutenant John: "Hyperion is under attack by slavers. Please help us defend civilians on Erath by destroy ing 35 slavers. Beware, they constantly get reinforcements from the outskirts of this solarsystem. "

Completion

Lieutenant John: "Good work captain, we have rescued a lot of civilians that had been captured. I hope these resources will do as payment."
